# GitHub Copilot — CoverKit Use Cases

Read [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) for repo purpose, monorepo rules, and skill index.

To add a use case, follow [`docs/create-a-use-case.md`](../docs/create-a-use-case.md) and [`.cursor/skills/new-usecase/SKILL.md`](../.cursor/skills/new-usecase/SKILL.md).

Every `plugins/coverkit-usecase-*` bootstrap must include a full WordPress plugin header with `Requires Plugins: coverkit`.
